objects.name: Tracking Iranian APT Screening Serpens’ 2026 Espionage Campaigns
objects.description: Unit 42 details Screening Serpens' use of AppDomainManager hijacking and new RAT variants to target tech and defense sectors in recent campaigns. The post Tracking Iranian APT Screening Serpens’ 2026 Espionage Campaigns appeared first on Unit 42 .
